title: Teledyne Princeton Instruments announces new series of CCD cameras for Original Equipment Manufacturers
text: The LANSIS CCD cameras extend Teledyne's spectroscopy portfolio into system integrator and OEM markets The LANSIS CCD cameras extend Teledyne's spectroscopy portfolio into system integrator and OEM markets

title: Teledyne Paradise Datacom Q-Lite Modem Selected by GISS for COBALT Manpack Terminals for Polish Armament Agency
text: CHELMSFORD, England--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Paradise Datacom awarded a $1.3M contract for Q-Lite Modems for GISS COBALT Manpack Terminals for the Polish Armament Agency
